personalInfo.name: Manouk van Draanen
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.subTitle: Full-Stack Engineering
personalInfo.bio: Versatile Software Engineer and Technical Consultant specializing in ServiceNow (SaaS), .NET, and modern front-end web development. Experienced at translating complex functional requirements into scalable, client-centric technical solutions.

projects.title: Fietsmaatjes Amsterdam Nieuw-Sloten
projects.description: A high-performance, fully configurable web platform built for a local community initiative that pairs volunteer cyclists with guests who can no longer cycle independently.

projects.title: Donnybap
projects.description: A high-performance, single-page landing site designed for an Amsterdam-based pop-up takeaway concept serving custom Korean Bibimbap.

projects.title: Schengen Tracker
projects.description: A lightweight mobile utility application designed to help non-EU travelers monitor their stay limits and prevent visa violations within the Schengen Area.

experience.description: Led the development and maintenance of a mission-critical .NET framework and B2B integration application facilitating partner asset procurement for physical telecommunications infrastructure.
achievements: Engineered custom .NET applications to automate the ordering, validation, and tracking of physical hardware assets required for enterprise digital service delivery.
Streamlined complex external API integrations with telecom partners, ensuring precise hardware configurations and seamless data exchanges across distributed inventory networks.
Optimized resource allocation and delivery pipeline logic, significantly reducing deployment friction and latency for physical service handovers.

experience.description: Led the architectural design and deployment of enterprise Common Service Data Model (CSDM) frameworks and secure API integrations within the ServiceNow platform.
achievements: Architected and implemented a structured CSDM framework, aligning IT infrastructure with business services to drastically improve configuration item (CI) traceability.
Designed and engineered secure, high-performance REST/SOAP API integrations to seamlessly synchronize ServiceNow with critical third-party enterprise systems.
Spearheaded platform security hardening and data access controls, ensuring strict compliance with enterprise governance and data protection standards.

experience.description: Led the technical refinement, architectural design, and end-to-end development of custom ServiceNow solutions orchestrating nationwide digital service delivery.
achievements: Collaborated with business stakeholders to refine complex functional requirements into production-ready technical architecture on the ServiceNow platform.
Engineered core workflow automation and orchestration logic responsible for provisioning multi-play digital services, including high-availability internet, VoIP, and security alarm configurations.
Served as a core technical consultant within a cross-functional team, ensuring platform scalability and alignment with strict enterprise service delivery standards.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Media & Entertainment Management
education.description: A dynamic creative-business degree specializing in film and gaming production, paired with a specialized minor in music industry contract law.
